rows.label: qev300061_MSG0001
rows.name: Hey! You here with the miranium?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev300061_MSG0002
rows.name:
I need it for my research—I'm looking
into miranium applications for the
integrated production plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev300061_SEL0021
rows.name: Hold on to your miranium for now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev300061_MSG0004
rows.name:
Perfect, thank you. Rest assured,
it will be put to good use for
the sake of the city![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev300061_MSG0006
rows.name:
That's very kind, but I'm afraid this is less than
the requested quantity. I believe the posting was
for 1,200 units? Please come back when you have it.[ST:wait ]
